comment.text: This message confirms the successful creation of a new general link after an existing one has been revoked. It appears as a success notification (using `toastr`) in the UI, typically when sharing a link in a primary room or form. Translators should ensure the wording conveys both the revocation and creation aspects of the action.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English source key 'GeneralLinkRevokedAndCreatedSuccessfully' and the context indicate that the action involves both revoking an old link and creating a new one. The Arabic translation only mentions the creation of the new link, omitting the 'revoked' aspect of the process.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: تم إلغاء الرابط العام وإنشاء رابط جديد بنجاح

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English source key 'GeneralLinkRevokedAndCreatedSuccessfully' and the context indicate that the action involves both revoking an old link and creating a new one. The Bulgarian translation only mentions the creation, omitting the 'revoked' aspect which is crucial for the user to understand why the previous link stopped working.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Новият главен линк беше оттеглен и създаден успешно
